% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID11395.
\tzpentry{ID11395}{Nested Energy Density Fourth-Power Scaling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
If mode energy scales as hbar omega and omega scales as inverse radius while volume scales as R cubed, energy density scales as R to the minus fourth.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
E_{n}\sim\hbar\omega_{n},\quad V_{n}\sim R_{n}^{3},\quad \omega_{n}\sim R_{n}^{-1}\Rightarrow \rho_{n}\sim R_{n}^{-4}
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{c8785047-aace-5da3-b034-10ea420841bb}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11395-portal-breathing}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
